#+title: Collab Test Fixture Overview
#+filetags: :collabtest:fixture:

A tiny, throwaway knowledge base used as a **test fixture** for the trusted-peer
KB replication & per-KB membership end-to-end tests (ADR-017). It deliberately
carries no real user data so it can be committed and shared between machines.

The sentinel token ZEPHYRINE appears only in this fixture, so a test can assert
that the KB actually replicated to a peer (search for ZEPHYRINE → this node)
rather than matching incidental content.

This KB is a 3-node star: this overview links out to two leaf nodes.

** Structure
- [[references:collabtest:alpha][Alpha]] — first leaf (sentinel QUOKKA)
- [[references:collabtest:beta][Beta]] — second leaf (sentinel NARWHAL)

See also: [[references:collabtest:alpha][Alpha Node]], [[references:collabtest:beta][Beta Node]].
